note: Sub-series tagged by `series`. Run tezos/series/bridge.mjs to mint-cache as @jeffrey.

feedback.title: drift
feedback.source:
; feedback · drift
(once (wipe black))
(ink (0.2s... lime green white))
(circle (+ width/2 (* 40 (sin))) height/2 4)
(scroll 2 0)
(zoom 1.003)
(blur 1)

feedback.title: vortex
feedback.source:
; feedback · vortex
(once (wipe black))
(ink (0.1s... red orange yellow lime green))
(box (- width/2 3) (- height/2 3) 6 6)
(spin 2)
(zoom 1.02)
(blur 1)

feedback.source:
; feedback · swell

(ink (0.3s... aquamarine turquoise mediumblue))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 6 (* 5 (sin))))
(zoom 1.012)
(scroll 0 1)
(blur 1)

clock.title: tick
clock.source:
; clock · tick
(wipe black)
(ink (1s... lime green white))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 10 (* 8 (sin))))
(ink white)
(1s (box 0 (- height 10) width 10))

clock.title: metronome
clock.source:
; clock · metronome
(0.5s (wipe black))
(ink (1s... red orange yellow lime green))
(box (1s... 8 (- width 24)) (- height/2 8) 16 16)

clock.title: pulse
clock.source:
; clock · pulse
(wipe (1s... black navy))
(ink (0.5s... springgreen lime yellow))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 6 (* 20 (sin))))

clock.title: grow
clock.source:
; clock · grow
(8s (wipe black))
(ink (0.5s... violet deeppink white))
(circle width/2 height/2 (* 6 (mod frame 80)))
(blur 1)

clock.title: pendulum
clock.source:
; clock · pendulum
(wipe black)
(ink (1s... lime green white))
(line width/2 0 (+ width/2 (* 60 (sin))) height)
(ink white)
(0.5s (circle (+ width/2 (* 60 (sin))) (- height 8) 5))

melody.title: ascend
melody.source:
; melody · ascend
(wipe black)
(melody "4cdefgab5c" 132)
(ink (0.1s... springgreen lime yellow))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 8 (* 50 amplitude)))
(blur 1)

melody.title: waltz
melody.source:
; melody · waltz
(wipe (0.5s... midnightblue black))
(melody "5ceg5ceg 4c.." 120 "3/4" "waltz")
(ink (0.2s... red orange yellow lime green))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 6 (* 45 amplitude)))

melody.title: penta
melody.source:
; melody · penta
(wipe black)
(melody "5cdega6c" 144 "4/4" "swing")
(ink (0.15s... gold orange crimson))
(circle width/2 height/2 (+ 6 (* 45 amplitude)))
(spin 1)

melody.title: duet
melody.source:
; melody · duet
(wipe black)
(melody "5ceg 3c4g" 120)
(ink (0.1s... aquamarine turquoise mediumblue))
(circle (- width/2 30) height/2 (+ 6 (* 40 amplitude)))
(circle (+ width/2 30) height/2 (+ 6 (* 40 amplitude)))

melody.title: bells
melody.source:
; melody · bells
(wipe midnightblue)
(melody "{sine}6cegb6ce" 160)
(ink (0.1s... white aqua skyblue))
(circle width/2 (+ height/2 (* 30 (sin))) (+ 4 (* 30 amplitude)))

melody.title: drone
melody.source:
; melody · drone
(wipe black)
(melody "{sine}3c,,,3g,,," 60)
(ink (0.3s... cyan teal blue navy))
(box (- width/2 20) (- height/2 20) (+ 8 (* 60 amplitude)) (+ 8 (* 60 amplitude)))
(blur 2)
